summary: Tank spawns and drives! Reworked the controls so it steers cleanly instead of drifting sideways.

milestones.title: Drivable tank on a test map
milestones.detail: Drive with WASD, mouse-aimed turret, and a chase camera.

milestones.title: Shooting & damage
milestones.detail: Click to fire a shell with travel time; tanks take damage and can be destroyed.

milestones.title: Domination mode
milestones.detail: Capture points, team scoring, and respawns from the garage.

milestones.title: Tank builder garage
milestones.detail: Build custom tanks from parts with weight and power trade-offs (the hardest part — saved for last).

recent.text: 🎉 FORGE build system set up and tested end-to-end. Daniel can now build by talking to @forge in Slack.
🔧 First playtest showed pillars but no tank — reworked tank spawning so it lands on the ground right in front of the spawn pad and seats you automatically.
🐛 Tracked the missing tank to a bad Roblox enum name that crashed tank-building on every spawn. Fixed it — tanks now appear.
🎮 First drive felt like a drift cart — reworked the controls so the tank drives straight along the way it's facing with no sideways sliding, and keeps you in the driver seat.
